conversations.jd_after_snapshot:
# Sales executive
Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India
Experience: Approximately 1–3
Type: Full-time

## About Us
WOGOM is a B2B Commerce and Retail Enablement Platform, empowering 6,000+ retailers and 450+ sellers across India with better Products, Pricing, Credit, and Growth Opportunities. Our goal is to build a connected ecosystem where technology, capital, and commerce converge to help Indian retailers scale with confidence.

## Role Overview
The Sales Executive role is results-driven, requiring a strong background in customer relationship management and a proven track record of achieving sales targets. The ideal candidate will possess excellent communication skills, a target achievement mindset, and the ability to work independently with minimal oversight.

## Key Responsibilities
• Generate leads and convert prospects into customers through cold calls, emails, and meetings, building strong relationships and identifying new business opportunities.
• Maintain and grow relationships with existing clients to ensure repeat business, by understanding customer needs and tailoring solutions.
• Prepare and deliver presentations, proposals, and negotiated quotes to clients, showcasing the value of WOGOM's products and services.
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets by developing and executing sales plans that drive sales growth and expansion.
• Track sales activities and update CRM with accurate customer and pipeline data.

## Requirements
### Must-Have Skills
• Sales and negotiation skills to generate leads and convert prospects into customers.
• Customer relationship management skills to understand customer needs and tailor solutions.
• Target achievement mindset to set and achieve sales targets.
• Excellent communication skills to prepare and deliver presentations, proposals, and negotiated quotes.
• Ability to work independently and collaborate with marketing and product teams.

### Nice-to-Have Skills
• CRM usage (e.g., Salesforce, Zoho) to track sales activities and update CRM.
• Basic MS Excel skills to analyze sales data and inform sales strategies.
• Experience with sales and customer-facing business development.

## Who Will Succeed in This Role
The ideal candidate will be results-driven, collaborative, and independent, with a strong background in customer relationship management and a proven track record of achieving sales targets.
